calendar.matters:
MOTION / Petition For Relief From Order Approving Compromise Of Minor'S Claim And For Amended Order
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for Motion/Petition for Relief form Order approving Compromise of Minor's Claim

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:04:12 a.m. and concluding at 10:14:40 a.m.(D505)

Dixon Kummer, Esq., appearing for and on behalf of Claimant and Petitioner Cody Sass via Zoom Video Conference was placed under oath.
Claimant Cody Sass not appearing.

Order appointing Guardian Ad litem filed July 6, 1999
Petition for Compromise of Disputed Claim filed September 12, 2000
Order approving compromise of claim filed September 19, 2000
Petition from relief from order approving compromise of minor's claim filed June 6, 2023.
Motion/Notice of hearing for Dept. 505 filed September 29, 2023.

Counsel requests the court to take judicial notice of the declaration.

Counsel summarizes the progression of the Petition.

Counsel orally request for an order shortening time and to waive personal appearance of
witness.

The Court grants the request for an order shortening time and to waive personal appearance of witness.

The Court confirms with counsel that declarations filed and statements made are true and correct.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of the Claimant Cody Sass.

Proposed order signed by the Court and filed this day.

See scanned order

MOTION / Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Relief From Order Approving Compromise Of Minor'S Claim And For Amended Order
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff CODY SASS' Petition For Relief From Order Approving Compromise Of Minor's Claim And For Amended Order.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff CODY SASS' unopposed "petition for relief from order approving compromise of minor's claim" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to the court a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Notice Of Motion To Substitute Attorneys, Declarations Of Cody Sass And Dixon G. Kummer; And Memorandum Of Points (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Kummer Rose, Esq. 415-332-6000 for Plaintiff.
Dixon G. Kummer, Esq. 661-324-2700, moving party.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Atty. Dixon Kummer's Motion To Substitute Attorneys for Plaintiff Cody Sass.

Granted. Mr. Kummer to submit a proposed form of order on the mandatory judicial council form.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CK).
